purpose: Independent K0 source-to-implementation map. It limits KERC claims to the mechanisms actually exercised by the current code, data, objectives, and evaluators.

incremental_replay_contract.claim_ceiling: Replay performance, restartability, selective invalidation, integrity, and physical resource accounting only; no semantic, learned, utility, compression, or KERC-thesis claim.

mechanisms.current_finding: Immutable source and typed protected-object storage exist, but protected-span extraction is a deterministic regex baseline rather than a trained calibrated detector.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Exact source/object protocol mechanics only; no learned protected-span recall, domain robustness, or abstention claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Source-disjoint learned detector with span recall, weak tails, calibration, adversarial identifiers/quotes/code, abstention, and exact-object intervention tests.

mechanisms.current_finding: The correction-lattice schema preserves uncertainty, but the canonical corpus contains zero correction alternatives and does not train lexical correction or abstention.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Licensed noisy/dialect/transcription/code-switch data with reviewed alternatives, calibrated preserve/correct/hypothesize/abstain targets, and overcorrection attacks.

mechanisms.current_finding: A trainable stage route and separate code space exist. Two separately accounted 256-row MASC strata preserve either 2-8 independently replayed manual FrameNet annotations or aligned committed-belief, MPQA subjectivity, and event annotations as multi-node/multi-root programs with zero additional unique-source credit. A 13-row stratum reconstructs 215 mentions in complete manual named GATE event-coreference groups using independent alignment, bounded source windows, and whole-group rejection. A separate 846-row stratum preserves complete manually linked MPQA expression-to-attitude, attitude-to-target, and ordered nested-source graphs using independent regex and state-machine parsers; 613 incomplete or ambiguous linked expressions are wholly rejected. K1h adds 9,785 licensed human GUM eRST relation neighborhoods from 89 official-train documents: producer ElementTree/tab parsing and verifier Expat/CSV state-machine parsing independently preserve source-declared primary and secondary edge topology, direction, nuclearity, source alignment, and signal counts across document-disjoint internal splits. All 32 admitted relation types occur in every split, 339 source-declared secondary edges are preserved, official GUM dev/test/test2 documents are excluded, and inferred links, partial admission, public score claims, and extra source credit are zero. Weak-tail counts of 4/5/5 are coverage evidence rather than adequacy. Proposition scope, truth, quantification, compositional negation, general coreference, complete sentence semantics, and learned competence remain unclaimed; unsupported source fields remain opaque bytes.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Trainable serialization-path mechanics; no semantic compilation, compositionality, paraphrase convergence, or learned Kernel competence claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Human/replayed multi-proposition graphs with scope, modality, coreference, temporal/causal relations, ambiguity, minimal pairs, paraphrase convergence, cycle, and entailment/question-preservation objectives.

mechanisms.current_finding: Concept capsule and pointer schemas exist, but the canonical corpus has no concept capsules and therefore does not exercise identity reuse or open-world definition handling.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Cross-document concept identity, alias/coreference, unseen concept capsule, migration, collision, stale-definition, and wrong-identity interventions.

mechanisms.current_finding: A compatibility hash exists, but no learned grammar-aware macro inventory is present or exercised by the canonical corpus.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: No macro-fusion, shortening, or compute claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Train-only grammar-valid macro induction with deterministic expansion, heldout undertraining statistics, collision/migration tests, and equal-budget no-macro control.

mechanisms.current_finding: Four typed residual channels, VCM lifecycle, replay, synchronization, and privacy fields exist; current supervision predicts channel presence and the corpus does not populate an interaction-global residual dictionary.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Residual packet/lifecycle/codec mechanics only; no learned hierarchy value or interaction amortization claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Per-unit source-bound residual decisions and real multi-turn shared dictionaries with context-present/withheld/shuffled/wrong-user causal controls.

mechanisms.current_finding: Typed claims and decisions exist. Independently replayed MASC composite, decision-semantic, event-coreference, complete MPQA-relation, and GUM eRST strata now produce 1,700 multi-claim packets and 11,156 multi-node programs. The 13 event-group packets preserve 215 manually grouped mentions; 846 MPQA packets preserve expression, source-chain, attitude, and target members plus manual link topology; 9,785 GUM records preserve bounded discourse-edge neighborhoods including 339 source-declared secondary edges; and the decision-semantic stratum carries typed observed modality, polarity, temporal orientation, event, and subjectivity fields. These are annotation-preservation targets, not truth or learned reasoning. There are still no derivation proofs, contradictions, quantities, general proposition scope, quantification, compositional negation, unresolved ambiguity, or PARTIAL decisions, and unsupported source content remains opaque byte literals.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Answer schema and validation mechanics only; no structured reasoning or exact-answer semantic quality claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Multi-claim derivations, quantities/units/ranges, evidence links, alternatives, contradictions, unresolved ambiguity, PARTIAL, and compositional answer supervision.

mechanisms.current_finding: A trainable renderer route, surface vocabulary, and copy path exist, but no behavior-positive source-disjoint renderer evidence exists.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Trainable route, shape, and checkpoint mechanics only; deterministic/literal rendering receives zero learned credit.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Model-only paraphrase and faithful/lossless rendering with copy interventions, rare identifiers, quotations, style controls, and independent functional/human evaluation.

mechanisms.current_finding: Hard structured checks and a separately parameterized classifier exist, but the hard projection ignores opaque byte-literal content and the learned verifier has not been independently calibrated on broad semantic corruptions.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Listed structured-dimension mutation detection and verifier-head mechanics only; no semantic equivalence, truth, or verification-value claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Reject byte-literal substitution plus independently produced hard negatives for scope, time, causality, attribution, quantity, caveat, ambiguity, and correlated compiler/recompiler error.

mechanisms.current_finding: The adaptive order-1 arithmetic codec has exact encode/decode replay and explicit encoded/uncompressed bit receipts.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Faithful finite-state codec mechanics and measured bit cost only; not a learned entropy model, compression win, or total-system efficiency result.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Retain as the strong exact baseline; any learned challenger must include parameters, latency, memory, energy, synchronization, and recovery cost.

mechanisms.current_finding: Four packet-level fidelity candidates are selected using measured encoded bits, omitted packet-owned residual mass, calibrated source-visible structural importance, and protected minima.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Faithful implementation of this narrow packet-level structural controller only; its distortion is not semantic utility and it is not the paper's learned per-unit allocator.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Keep as a matched baseline for the per-unit learned constrained policy.

mechanisms.current_finding: The current neural head predicts four record-level channel-presence labels. It has no source-bound per-unit q_i decisions, measured per-unit rates/distortions, constraints, or missing-signal masks.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: No learned residual allocation claim. Presence-label overfit is a mechanics diagnostic only.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Typed units, candidate actions, causal importance features, measured rate/distortion, hard constraints, differentiable constrained training, intervention sensitivity, and policy-versus-oracle regret.

mechanisms.current_finding: Promotion economics and VCM state transitions exist, but the corpus uses independent records and has no nonempty coded interaction-global dictionary. The interaction target is currently derived from segment presence.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Promotion transaction and break-even arithmetic mechanics only; no learned reuse, declining per-turn overhead, consistency, or causal utility claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Coherent multi-turn episodes with repeated terminology, learned promote/local decisions, per-turn rate curves, expiry/deletion, wrong-user isolation, and context causal ablations.

mechanisms.current_finding: A shared trunk with stage adapters, code-space masks, auxiliary heads, and joint-loss plumbing exists. The stages are not independently capable modules and current targets do not exercise the complete KERC causal pipeline.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Shared-trunk route, gradient, shape, and objective compatibility mechanics only.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Representative-subset overfit and interventions for protected spans, compiler, core, per-unit allocator, answer head, renderer, and verifier under one versioned objective ledger.

mechanisms.current_finding: KERC tensors, optimizer state, schema identity, migration, rollback, resume, and bounded Apple-MLX execution are replayed.
mechanisms.claim_ceiling: Checkpoint/state and bounded MLX mechanics only; no sustained throughput, energy, CUDA parity, or learned utility claim.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Multi-seed full-shape resource replay with memory/energy telemetry and cropped/uncropped equivalence before the campaign.

mechanisms.current_finding: The decision head can overfit observed ANSWER/CLARIFY/ABSTAIN mechanics, but PARTIAL is absent and the result is not source-disjoint calibration or selective-risk evidence.
mechanisms.next_evidence: Source-disjoint PARTIAL, ambiguity, insufficient/conflicting evidence, calibration, selective-risk, class-balance, and decision-intervention evidence.

hypotheses.claim_ceiling: No evidence until the frozen matched campaign measures expanded/compact lengths and all residual/object/macro overhead.
No evidence until matched end-to-end quality and full FLOP/latency/energy/KV/lifecycle cost are measured.
No evidence until matched raw bytes, FLOPs, tuning, seeds, source-disjoint utility, and uncertainty are measured.
Exact-object mechanics are not a learned fidelity win; no evidence until equal-budget rare-name/identifier/number/quotation comparisons run.
No evidence until per-unit learned hierarchy beats token-only, global-only, and no-residual controls on rate and fidelity.
No evidence while the coded global dictionary is empty and no coherent multi-turn rate curve exists.
No evidence until independent semantic verification reduces accepted errors under matched retry and total cost.
No evidence until spelling/domain/OOD transfer is source-disjoint and compared against strong byte/dynamic-chunking controls without aggressive-correction hiding.

integration.rule: Any KERC roadmap, registry, promotion, freeze, or negative-verdict claim must remain at or below this independently audited claim ceiling.
